Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

snippet.title: Knight Rider Reboot (2026) | Chris Hemsworth, Mads Mikkelsen, Charlize Theron | Concept Trailer
snippet.description:
#KnightRider #ChrisHemsworth #charlizetheron #madsmikkelsen 

Watch the Knight Rider Reboot Fan-Made Concept Trailer

Chris Hemsworth behind the wheel of the most legendary artificially intelligent vehicle in all of television history with the chillingly talented Mads Mikkelsen and the electrically fierce Charlize Theron as the trio creates a team that seems destined to be perfectly matched and ideally suited for a modern take on the long-loved and much-enduring franchise of Knight Rider. With Hemsworth's inherent charm, effortless cool and innate talent to turn any character he plays into his own; he would be the perfect individual to take the KITT legacy and carry it forward into the exciting new world of cinema; while Mikkelsen's unrivaled talent to convey antagonists of great depth, complexity and unpredictability and Theron's explosive power on screen provide a dynamic of such richness and potential for so many thrilling moments of drama in every scene that every frame of this concept trailer exudes the same level of high-octane excitement, cutting-edge technology and edge-of-your-seat suspense that made Knight Rider a cultural phenomenon in the first place.

From heart-pounding chases at breakneck speeds through treacherously deadly highways and roads where KITT's AI pushes the limits of what can ever be done by any machine to a deeply emotional and personal story of the bond of loyalty and trust between a man and the most technologically advanced vehicle in the world, this concept for a reboot of Knight Rider gives the fans of the original series everything they've dreamed of for decades. The synergy of Hemsworth's magnetic presence as a leading man, Mikkelsen's icy demeanor as an antagonist and Theron's unstoppable energy as an actress makes this one of the most energizing fan-made concepts of 2026, and undoubtedly a clear call-to-action for Hollywood to immediately revive KITT and bring it back to life!

Disclaimer: This is a Fan-Made Concept Trailer for Entertainment/Artistic Purposes Only. This Fan Project is Not connected to, nor affiliated with, nor endorsed by, nor officially related to, Chris Hemsworth, Mads Mikkelsen, Charlize Theron, NBC, or any other Official Knight Rider Production Teams. snippet.title: Wolf Alice - The Sofa (Live at The BRIT Awards 2026)
snippet.description:
Listen to ‘The Sofa’: https://wolfalice.lnk.to/the-sofaAY 
The new album ‘The Clearing’ out now : https://wolfalice.lnk.to/the-clearingAY 
Sign up for updates: http://wolfalice.lnk.to/signupAY

———

Follow Wolf Alice: https://www.wolfalice.co.uk 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/wolfaliceband
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@wolfalicemusic
Twitter: https://x.com/wolfalicemusic 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/wolfalicemusic 

———

Lyrics:

Hope I can accept the wild thing in me
Hope nobody comes to tame her
And she can be free
Sick of second guessing my behaviour and what I want to be
Just let me lie here on the sofa
And put the reruns on tv
 
And I’ll be fine, I’ll be ok 
I feel kind of lucky right now and I’m not ashamed to say
I can be happy, I can be sad, I can be a bitch when I get mad 
I want to settle down oh to fall in love but sometimes I just want to fuck
I love my life, I love my life but sometimes I just want to…
 
Let me lie here on
I could lie here all day long
Let me lie here on the sofa
The sofa, the sofa, on the sofa
(Sometimes I just want to)
Be no one thing
The intellectual beauty queen
 
Didn’t make it out to California 
Where I thought I might clean the slate
Feels a little like I’m stuck in Seven Sisters
North London, oh England
And maybe that’s ok

#WolfAlice #BRITs
